_comment: Odoo 15 differentiation from odoo-12 base: Python 3.8 baseline, OWL 1.x introduced ALONGSIDE legacy QWeb+jQuery (transitional release), QWeb component split started. Legacy ORM still dominant — reuses odoo-12 rule pack but flag OWL-specific code via skill references. TODO: add templates/cursor/rules/odoo-15/ for OWL 1.x specifics.
description: Odoo 15 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.8+, TRANSITIONAL: QWeb+jQuery legacy + OWL 1.x intro. Legacy ORM dominant; reuses odoo-12 rule pack — flag OWL component code separately.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.

_rules_comment: TODO: differentiate from odoo-12 base when templates/cursor/rules/odoo-15/ is authored. v15 is transitional — most backend ORM still v12-era, only OWL frontend new.
_overlay_doc: Version-specific invariants merged on top of project invariants.json by a FUTURE installer step (setup.py --merge-invariants, not yet wired — Wave C). Same schema as .agent-toolkit/invariants.json entries. severity=warn (informational). Cite a confirmed Odoo release fact per entry.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 15 introduced the manifest `assets` dict — register JS/CSS bundles there, not via the legacy <template> asset-inheritance XML.
invariants_overlay.rationale: Odoo 15 added the `assets` key to `__manifest__.py` (introduced in v15, NOT v14); new bundles should be declared there instead of the v12-era `<template inherit_id="web.assets_backend">` XML pattern. Fix when violated: restore the `assets` manifest entry the edit dropped (or confirm bundles are intentionally declared elsewhere).

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 15 provides the @api.constrains-friendly `_check_company` consistency helper + `check_company=True` field attr — use it on company-scoped relational fields instead of hand-rolled cross-company guards.
invariants_overlay.rationale: From v15 the multi-company consistency check (`check_company=True` on Many2one/One2many + the `_check_company` helper) is the supported way to enforce company alignment; v12 lacked it and required manual constraints. Fix when violated: restore the `check_company=True` attr / `_check_company()` call the edit dropped.

invariants_overlay.description: Odoo 15 OWL 1.x JS components require the `/** @odoo-module **/` header; legacy odoo.define()/web.Widget is the QWeb path, not OWL.
invariants_overlay.rationale: v15 is transitional: OWL 1.x components need the `/** @odoo-module **/` ESM header, while legacy widgets use `odoo.define()`. An edit that strips both leaves a JS file in neither loader's discovery path. Fix when violated: restore the module header or odoo.define wrapper the edit dropped.
